title: What do people think of shadow AI? Security folk seem to love talking about it
abstract: What do people think of shadow AI? Security folk seem to love talking about it may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tool...
abstract_zh: 说到影子AI，安全宅们可是乐此不疲！虽然小众，但专注精准地解决了大问题。在这风云变幻的AI江湖里，专精工具就是武林秘籍，让你在暗处也能制胜！
